1 Students with language competence equivalent to these language

courses are exempted from the language requirement; such students are required to complete an additional six hours of electives in East Asian courses to fulﬁll the 24-credit requirement for the certiﬁcate.

Additional Requirements • An overall GPA of 2.0 in the certiﬁcate is required for graduation.

Nine of the 12 hours of electives must be upper division (3xx-4xx level
